An unranked Vitality is given during The Teacher Quest.
The increase to health capacity provided by Vitality is applied after rank bonuses from levelling up a warframe.

For example: the rank 0 base Health of Frost is 270. Once at rank 30, the Warframe will have a rank bonus of +100 base health, leading to an overall base health of 370. With a max rank Vitality, Frost's total health will be multiplied by 2 (+100% Health bonus from Vitality), giving a grand total of 740 health.
